title: `VCD warning: $dumpvars: Package ($unit) is not dumpable with VCD` even if there are no declared items in $unit
body:
I use the latest snapshot. When I compile the following module with `-g2012` I get a VCD warning.

`a.v`:
```verilog
module m;

logic s;

initial begin
	$dumpfile("signals.vcd");
	$dumpvars();
	s = 1;
end
endmodule
```

```
$ iverilog -g2012 a.v
$ ./a.out
VCD info: dumpfile signals.vcd opened for output.
VCD warning: $dumpvars: Package ($unit) is not dumpable with VCD.
```

`signals.vcd` file is readable. I do not get the error if I leave out `-g2012`.

Is this a feature or a bug?
code_blocks:
$ iverilog -g2012 a.v
$ ./a.out
VCD info: dumpfile signals.vcd opened for output.
VCD warning: $dumpvars: Package ($unit) is not dumpable with VCD.
